parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { model: 'deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V3.2', messages: [{ role: 'system', content: $json.system_prompt }, { role: 'user', content: $json.user_prompt }], max_tokens: 400, temperature: 0.85 } }}
={{ { material_id: null, persona_id: $json.persona_id, post_type: 'pulse', title: $json.title, body: $json.body, media_type: 'text', source: 'pulse', sort_order: -2 } }}

meta.notes: Persona Pulse: runs daily, generates one community update post per persona based on last 24h engagement summary + quiz failure hotspots. Posts use source='pulse', post_type='pulse', sort_order=-2 (higher priority than reactive). Env vars: SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY, FEATHERLESS_API_KEY. RPCs required: get_engagement_summary (engagement-rpc.sql), get_quiz_failure_hotspots (engagement-rpc.sql). NOTE: pulse posts have material_id=null which requires relaxing the posts FK constraint if it is NOT NULL in your schema.
